Issues: Conceptual Niche: While the image is technically strong, the core elements (Samurai, Neon Tokyo) are highly popular tropes. To maximize sales and prove ownership, the artist needs to ensure unique, highly specific design elements that differentiate this character from established manga/game IPs to avoid claims of stylistic derivation.

Market Specificity: The image targets a very specific, mature aesthetic (Japanese neo-noir sci-fi fantasy). This limits broad retail appeal but increases its value in dedicated fandom/collector markets.
Trademarking Focus: For commercial sale, the artist must be prepared to trademark the unique armor crests, specific color combinations, or the character name itself to solidify IP ownership.
